evals.prompt: 新しい決済機能を作ることになった。design doc はここ: https://docs.example.com/payment-v2。DB にテーブル追加、決済プロバイダ連携の SDK ラッパー、注文 API への組み込み、管理画面での決済履歴表示、あとウェブフックの受信処理が必要。stacked PR でやりたいから計画立てて。
evals.expected_output: Should create overview.md and individual plan files for 4-6 PRs. Each plan should have Scope, What solves Why, and Goal/Acceptance Criteria. The overview should link to the design doc and each plan. Each plan should contain explicit stacked-pr skill trigger instruction. Plans should NOT contain implementation details.

assertions.name: overview-created
assertions.check: Creates an overview.md with feature summary, references, and stack structure

assertions.name: individual-plans-created
assertions.check: Creates individual plan files for each PR in the stack

assertions.name: delegates-to-split-big-pr
assertions.check: Delegates split granularity to split-big-pr Phase 1

assertions.name: scope-defined
assertions.check: Each plan clearly defines what the PR covers and what it doesn't

assertions.name: what-solves-why
assertions.check: Each plan explains what problem the PR solves and why it's separate

assertions.name: acceptance-criteria
assertions.check: Each plan has concrete, verifiable acceptance criteria

assertions.name: stacked-pr-instruction
assertions.check: Each plan md contains explicit instruction to use stacked-pr skill

assertions.name: cross-links
assertions.check: Overview links to plans, each plan links back to overview

assertions.name: design-doc-reference
assertions.check: Overview includes the design doc URL in references

evals.prompt: 既存の認証をセッションベースから JWT に移行したい。ユーザーテーブルのスキーマ変更、トークン発行・検証ロジック、既存エンドポイントのミドルウェア差し替え、フロントの認証フロー変更、あと移行期間中の互換レイヤーも必要。plan 作ってくれない？
evals.expected_output: Should create a plan accounting for the migration complexity — compatibility layer is crucial. Should propose 4-6 PRs ordered with schema first, then token logic, then middleware, then frontend, with compatibility layer woven in appropriately. Each plan should have the required sections and stacked-pr instruction.

assertions.name: migration-complexity
assertions.check: Accounts for the need for a compatibility/transition layer

assertions.name: safe-ordering
assertions.check: Orders PRs so the system remains functional at each step

assertions.name: template-compliance
assertions.check: All plan files follow the specified template structure

assertions.name: stacked-pr-trigger
assertions.check: All plan files include stacked-pr skill trigger instruction

evals.prompt: ボタンの色を変えるだけなんだけど、stacked PR の計画立てて。
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this is too small for stacked PR planning and suggest a single PR instead.

assertions.name: no-unnecessary-plan
assertions.check: Correctly identifies the change is too small for stacked PR planning

assertions.name: alternative-suggested
assertions.check: Suggests using a single PR instead of stacking
